title: Mod Soup
description: A (not so) minimal kitchen sink pack
body:
Mod Soup is a personal modpack for me and my friends, stored here for safekeeping. Feel free to use it, but don’t expect support—things will break, and every update will ~~probably~~ ruins your world.

Includes:
- Industrial revolution
- Magic flowers
- funny magic color mod
- Computer Science (magic and computer flavour)
- gross biology
- cool looking caves
- cool looking mobs
- a slightly better world
- And whatever else got added on a whim.

Good luck.
